ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name or handle of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "friends_count" INTEGER /* Number of friends or following the user has */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is verified */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "description" TEXT /* User's bio or description */,
  "protected" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is protected */,
  "last_active_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the user was active on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tweet was posted */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been retweeted */,
  "favorite_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been favorited */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the tweet was posted */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Array of hashtags used in the tweet */,
  "in_reply_to_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being replied to */,
  "in_reply_to_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being replied to */,
  "quoted_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quoted tweet */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  "truncated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet content is truncated */,
  "entities" TEXT /* Additional entities like URLs, media, and mentions */,
  "lang" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "possibly_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet contains sensitive content */,
  "geo" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_in_reply_to_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("in_reply_to_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_in_reply_to_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("in_reply_to_status_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_quoted_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("quoted_status_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retweets" (
  "retweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retweet */,
  "original_tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original tweet that was retweeted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who retweeted the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the retweet was posted */,
  "quoted_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quoted tweet */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the retweet (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  "truncated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the retweet content is truncated */,
  "entities" TEXT /* Additional entities like URLs, media, and mentions */,
  "lang" TEXT /* Language of the retweet */,
  "possibly_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the retweet contains sensitive content */,
  "geo" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the retweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_original_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("original_tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_quoted_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("quoted_status_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_name" TEXT /* Name of the hashtag */,
  "first_used_at" TEXT /* Date and time the hashtag was first used */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Date and time the hashtag was last used */,
  "total_usage_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the hashtag has been used */,
  "parent_hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent hashtag if the hashtag is part of a hierarchy */,
  "trending_score" TEXT /* Trending score of the hashtag */,
  "reach" INTEGER /* Number of unique users who have seen the hashtag */,
  "engagement_rate" TEXT /* Engagement rate of the hashtag (e.g., likes, retweets, comments per usage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_hashtags" (
  "user_hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-hashtag relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  "first_used_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user first used the hashtag */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user last used the hashtag */,
  "total_usage_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the user has used the hashtag */,
  "last_engagement_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the user engaged with the hashtag (e.g., liked, retweeted, commented) */,
  "engagement_rate" TEXT /* Engagement rate of the user with the hashtag */,
  "reach" INTEGER /* Number of unique users who have seen the user's posts with the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_hashtags_hashtag_id FOREIGN KEY ("hashtag_id") REFERENCES hashtags ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_hashtags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_hashtags" (
  "state_hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state-hashtag relationship */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the hashtag was used */,
  "first_used_at" TEXT /* Date and time the hashtag was first used in the state */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Date and time the hashtag was last used in the state */,
  "total_usage_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the hashtag has been used in the state */,
  "reach" INTEGER /* Number of unique users who have seen the hashtag in the state */,
  "engagement_rate" TEXT /* Engagement rate of the hashtag in the state */,
  "trending_score" TEXT /* Trending score of the hashtag in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_hashtags_hashtag_id FOREIGN KEY ("hashtag_id") REFERENCES hashtags ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_hashtags" (
  "tweet_hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet-hashtag relationship */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  "engagement_rate" TEXT /* Engagement rate of the tweet with the hashtag */,
  "reach" INTEGER /* Number of unique users who have seen the tweet with the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_hashtags_hashtag_id FOREIGN KEY ("hashtag_id") REFERENCES hashtags ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_hashtags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "d1_duration" REAL /* Duration of the task on dataset 1 */,
  "d2_duration" REAL /* Duration of the task on dataset 2 */,
  "d3_duration" REAL /* Duration of the task on dataset 3 */,
  "no_of_output_rows" INTEGER /* Number of output rows generated by the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., pending, running, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the task was created */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Date and time the task started */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the task completed */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the task fails */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the task */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
